short_summary: Iran deal near, gang leader killed
rationale: For US residents, the near-concluded Iran deal and confirmation of the Tren de Aragua leader's killing in a US airstrike are the most directly relevant developments this cycle.

top_events.title: US kills Tren de Aragua leader in airstrike, Trump confirms
top_events.summary: Trump confirmed a US airstrike killed the leader of Venezuela's Tren de Aragua gang, a direct US military action with domestic security and political implications. Continuation of aggressive anti-gang posture.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal near conclusion, Khamenei funeral announced
top_events.summary: A US-Iran deal remains close but unsigned; Khamenei's death could accelerate or complicate negotiations. If concluded, it could affect oil prices and US military posture in the Middle East.

top_events.title: Anthropic suspends new AI tools over US government security concerns
top_events.summary: Anthropic continues to restrict AI tool access for foreign nationals due to federal security concerns; ongoing policy with no new qualitative escalation this cycle.
